environment.label: Environment
environment.description: Reveals the family context in which the person grew up — who did what in their parents' home — and the unconscious models they've internalised.

talent.label: Talent
talent.description: Assesses what the person can actually do, their acquired practical skills. Two tasks are compared to identify which one they handle best.

preference.label: Preference
preference.description: Explores what the person enjoys or tolerates doing. Two tasks are compared to identify which one they'd best handle on a regular basis.

value.label: Value
value.description: Sheds light on a person's deep convictions about what is fair, normal or desirable in running a household — often shaped by upbringing or beliefs.
